favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.empty: You don't have any favorite routes

footer.description: Collaborative platform to share and organize trekking routes in Peru. Discover new adventures and connect with fellow trekking enthusiasts.

home.heroSubtitle: Find and join the best trekking groups in Peru. From the classic Inca Trail to hidden gems.
home.mostComplete: The most complete platform for trekkers in Peru
home.featureMapsDesc: View routes on detailed maps with waypoints, elevation and points of interest
home.featureCommunityDesc: Join trekking groups, share experiences and meet new adventurers
home.featureReviewsDesc: Read reviews from other trekkers and rate your route experiences
home.featureRoutesDesc: All routes include detailed info on difficulty, duration and required equipment

common.ctaDescription: Explore all TrekPeru routes and find your next Andean adventure.

interactive-maps.title: Interactive Maps
interactive-maps.subtitle: Explore routes like never before with detailed maps, waypoints, elevation profiles and integrated points of interest.
interactive-maps.benefit1Desc: Every route includes key points marked with exact coordinates so you never get lost.
interactive-maps.benefit2Desc: Visualize the elevation gain of every segment before you go and prepare your body for the challenge.
interactive-maps.benefit3Desc: Toggle between satellite, topographic and terrain views to plan in detail.
interactive-maps.benefit4Desc: Download routes in GPX format and use them on your GPS or sport watch.
interactive-maps.step1: Explore the route on the map with unlimited zoom
interactive-maps.step2: Review the elevation profile and highlight points
interactive-maps.step3: Download the GPX and share it with your group

community.title: Active Community
community.subtitle: Connect with other trekkers, join groups, share experiences and find companions for your next adventure.
community.benefit1Desc: Organize group outings or join the ones others are already planning in your area.
community.benefit2Desc: Ask questions, share tips and coordinate logistics with the rest of the group.
community.benefit3Desc: See what outings are scheduled and join with a single click.
community.benefit4Desc: See each member's experience and completed routes before heading out together.
community.step1: Create your profile and add your favorite routes
community.step2: Join group outings or create your own
community.step3: Meet new adventurers and hit the trail together

reviews.title: Verified Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Pick your next adventure based on real experiences. Every review comes from a verified trekker.
reviews.benefit1Desc: Only users who completed the route can leave a review: no fake reviews.
reviews.benefit2Desc: Difficulty, scenery, logistics, safety and organization: useful data when planning.
reviews.benefit3Desc: Reviews can include photos of the trek so you know what to expect on each section.
reviews.benefit4Desc: The route creator can publicly reply to each review and improve the information.
reviews.step1: Complete a route and get the invitation to review
reviews.step2: Rate, upload photos and share your experience
reviews.step3: Help other trekkers choose their next adventure

routes.title: Verified Routes
routes.subtitle: Hundreds of curated routes with detailed information on difficulty, duration, elevation and required equipment.
routes.benefit1Desc: Every route is reviewed by the team before publication. Reliable information.
routes.benefit2Desc: Estimated times based on real trekker data, not just generic references.
routes.benefit3Desc: Each section has its own rating so you can evaluate the full challenge.
routes.benefit4Desc: Gear checklist and physical requirements so you don't forget anything important.
routes.step1: Filter by difficulty, duration or region
routes.step3: Book your spot or create the outing

routeForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the route, what to see, what to expect...

routeForm.imageGalleryDesc: Upload up to 10 additional images of the route
routeForm.mustLogin: You must sign in to create a route
routeForm.completeRequired: Please complete all required fields before continuing
routeForm.step1Desc: Fill in the essential details of the trekking route
routeForm.routeTitlePlaceholder: E.g.: Inca Trail to Machu Picchu
routeForm.descriptionPlaceholder2: Describe the route, its highlights, difficulty level and what participants can expect...
routeForm.descriptionHint: Minimum 20 characters. Be descriptive to attract participants.
routeForm.step2Desc: Set dates, capacity and costs for the trek
routeForm.costFreeHint: Leave at 0 if the trek is free
routeForm.step3Desc: Set the status and visibility of your route
routeForm.organizerDesc: Choose whether this route is published from your personal account or from a group where you have permissions.
routeForm.organizerPersonalDesc: Default option. The route will be shown with your profile.
routeForm.noGroupsHint: You do not have groups with route organizer permissions.
routeForm.showCreatorLabel: Show my name as this route's creator
routeForm.showCreatorHint: When enabled, the public route shows the group and your name as creator.
routeForm.step4Desc: Additional route information (all fields are optional)
routeForm.equipmentHint: List of recommended or required equipment for the trek
routeForm.emergencyHint: Emergency contact person during the route
routeForm.conditionsDesc: Information about services available on the route
routeForm.terrainHint: Select the terrain types you'll encounter on the route
routeForm.technicalLevelHint: Level of technical skills needed to complete the route
routeForm.helpPromptLabel: Don't know the elevation or altitude? Get the data easily
routeForm.copyPromptLabel: Copy this prompt and paste it in ChatGPT, Gemini or any AI:
routeForm.weatherSaveHint: Enter weather and temperature — will be saved as
routeForm.mapOptionalHint: This step is optional, but adding a map helps participants better visualize the route and plan their participation.
routeForm.step6Desc: Add photos to showcase the beauty of your route (optional)

routeForm.galleryHint: Add more photos of the landscape, trail, camps, flora, fauna, etc.
routeForm.galleryMax: Maximum 10 images. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP
routeForm.dayDescPlaceholder: Describe activities, distance, elevation, points of interest...
routeForm.itineraryHint: Describe each day of the trek with its activities, distances and highlights
routeForm.visibilityPublicDesc: Visible to everyone in searches and listings

routeForm.instructionWaypoints: Add important points of interest along the route (viewpoints, camps, lagoons, etc.)
routeForm.photoTip2: Show different perspectives of the route
routeForm.photoTip3: Include photos of the landscape, trail and points of interest
routeForm.mapInvalidValues: Invalid values — use numeric format, e.g.: -9.19
